title: rubus danicus var. intricatus
intro: Rubus danicus var. intricatus, also known as the Danish bramble or European thimbleberry, is a variety of the Rubus danicus plant species, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus danicus var. intricatus typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
